name: profile-suggest skill SKILL.md frontmatter declares it triggers on first-session SessionStart only
command: head -40 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/SKILL.md" 2>err.txt > head.txt && grep -q 'trigger: SessionStart' head.txt && grep -q 'first_session_only: true' head.txt && grep -q 'name: profile-suggest' head.txt && echo ok 1>&2
